一段无法忘却的峥嵘岁月！一段流传至今的江湖野史！
一群荣辱与共的生死兄弟！一个扛旗站顶的绝版时代！
笑看风云，并肩前行！
杜撰的真实，真实的杜撰！
哥几个，走着！

"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7313854577282482963","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"纯银耳坠的工笔还有写作的思想是非常的给力，这次这本书文章的结构简洁合理，全文语言铿锵有力，掷地有声，读来令人热血沸腾，心潮澎湃。真是非常的江湖义气！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702890337,"group_id":"7298621998496746531","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"82300035550"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7298621998496746531","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"4.1291654e+07"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":41291,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7313854222594835212","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"从初中一直都现在追了十多年了，一直都非常喜欢六哥的风格，这本小说回归了热血，回归了以前的感觉，一如既往的稳，
六哥的笔力非常了得，通过精彩的描写和细腻的情感刻画，成功地将读者带入了故事的世界中。
故事中的角色形象鲜明，栩栩如生，每个人物都有自己的独特性格和命运，一群肝胆相照的兄弟，一路上的风雨同舟，每天都在期待，继续加油码字！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1702890154,"group_id":"7298621998496746531","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+BIXIx6bZVmjRfA84gjDzw=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8f932738c9a34d5bb4d231e55dba080f~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776624051&x-signature=OZTaFIewZIHZ3A9SMI0q%2B5muhhk%3D","user_id":"82300035550","user_name":"六扇门-小硕"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"82300035550","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7298621998496746531","book_info":{"abstract":"（非爽文，不无敌~介意者慎入~）

comment_id":"7318116882488263465","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"哈哈哈哈，我从王赢开始看的，太爱六哥的书了，不知道六爷知不知道有几个游戏，明日之后和黎明觉醒，里面就是一个营地一帮人在一起的那种，里面会长二十多岁从大学毕业也开始看六爷的书，正好赶上明日开服创办营地‘盛会.，一玩就是四年，六爷书迷遍地，一天十更!头回看连载的小说 ，开头有点唠后面给我看进戏了，又找到以前看狼与兄弟的那种感觉，速更六爷!"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1703885693,"group_id":"7298621998496746531","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1x4yv9zCstWThAtffQjbgo28e/AZrblA1QTvMzCzSAn","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-passport.byteacctimg.com/img/user-avatar/27a22d76b75f906905d728154d7a0c8c~300x300.image","user_id":"3609054557253868","user_name":"427°C-183°C"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"3609054557253868","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7298621998496746531","book_info":{"abstract":"（非爽文，不无敌~介意者慎入~）

":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7425306197339013912","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"六哥给个角色，叫黄国睿，别死这么快 @纯银耳坠","text_exts":[{"e":23,"s":18,"text":"","tp":2,"uri":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N817km7TvvR7sXWisIQ+CPHg9rVTvolnufEHjQr9kBg/"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1728848855,"group_id":"7298621998496746531","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111058192556"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7298621998496746531","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1000"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读84小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":304000,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7338251108273980196","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《黑欲青春》是一部充满争议的小说，它以一种独特的叙事方式，描绘了一个充满欲望、痛苦和挣扎的青春期。这本书深刻地揭示了人性的复杂性和脆弱性，让读者在阅读过程中感受到了许多不安和震撼。故事的主人公是一个年轻的男孩，他在成长过程中经历了许多挫折和磨难。他追求权力和金钱，同时也体验到了人性的丑陋和残酷。在这个过程中，他不断地迷失和寻找自我，最终在经历了许多痛苦和黑暗之后找到了内心的光明。这本书最大的特点就是它对青春期欲望的描写，这种描写不仅深刻而且真实。作者通过主人公的经历，展示了人们在追求欲望的过程中所经历的各种情感变化和挣扎。同时，这本书也探讨了人性的复杂性和脆弱性，让读者对人性和生命有了更深刻的思考，然而，这本书也存在一些争议。有人认为它过于黑暗和压抑，让人感到不适；还有人认为它的情节有些牵强，不够真实。但是，无论怎样，这本书都是一部值得一读的作品。它以一种独特的方式展现了青春期的真实面貌，让读者在阅读中感受到了人性的复杂和生命的珍贵。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1708572672,"group_id":"7298621998496746531","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NwTEt54QpCFwX3IYyD8FMvY=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/8a94d685859b430e851d026c1d56ddf3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776616871&x-signature=Xcsl6qIEOjSQ6aBA7ZJ0hpjc6Iw%3D","user_id":"111058192556","user_name":"狼之逆鳞"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"111058192556","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num
